hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, urllib.request
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    payload = json.dumps({
        'session_id': data.get('session_id', ''),
        'transcript_path': data.get('transcript_path', ''),
        'cwd': data.get('cwd', '')
    }).encode()
    req = urllib.request.Request('http://127.0.0.1:4040/hooks/stop', data=payload, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'}, method='POST')
    urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=5)
except Exception:
    pass
"
